content: I was waiting for the bus at the pedestrian crossing at around 6:55 PM when I saw a blue SUV coming from the direction of the mall. It was going very fast. I saw the driver — it was definitely a woman. She had a dark hoodie pulled over her head, and I could see her profile — long hair, slender neck. The car hit the man crossing the road and didn’t stop. I screamed, but she accelerated. I saw her turn right onto Sector 46 Road. I am 100% sure it was a woman. I have poor eyesight without glasses, but I was wearing them that evening. I remember the car clearly because I saw the same model near my daughter’s school last month.
